heading: Allowable travel expenses
label: 5706 Allowable travel expenses
text: Except as otherwise permitted by this subchapter or by statutes relating to members of the uniformed services, only actual and necessary travel expenses may be allowed to an individual holding employment or appointment under the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large .5 U.S.C. 839, .June 9, 1949, ch. 185, § 663 Stat. 167The words “members of the uniformed services” are substituted for “military personnel”.Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.
